name: HR expense reimbursement policy example
answer:
Employees may submit eligible business expenses within 30 days.
Employees may submit eligible business expenses within 60 days.
The company provides a commuter shuttle.

sources.title: HR Expense Reimbursement Policy
sources.content:
Employees may submit eligible business expenses within 30 days.
Receipts are required for reimbursement requests.
Personal home internet costs are not reimbursed.
